userContent.content: {"sport":"basketball","league":"NBA","match_id":"nba_20260225_bos_lal","home_team":"Boston Celtics","away_team":"Los Angeles Lakers","status":"in_progress","phase":"Q4","clock":"02:31","score":{"home":102,"away":99},"possession":"home","highlights":[{"time":"04:10","text":"Lakers made a 7-0 run to cut the lead to 1."},{"time":"03:22","text":"Celtics hit a three-pointer to go up by 3."},{"time":"02:45","text":"Timeout called after a loose ball scramble."}],"last_update":"2026-02-25T21:10:00+08:00"}

finalResponse.content: {"content":"比赛进入最后两分半钟，凯尔特人队以102比99领先湖人队。湖人队在第四节末段打出一波7比0的小高潮，一度将分差缩小到仅剩1分，但凯尔特人队随即命中一记关键三分，重新将优势扩大到3分。一次争抢球后的暂停后，凯尔特人队握有球权，比赛进入白热化阶段。"}
